titleStmt.title: SII 22.14: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 14. (A.R. No. 14 of 1906) SALEM DISTRICT, NAMAKKAL TALUK, NĀMAKKAL. MUNIYAPPAN TEMPLE—ON THE SAME ROCK. TRIBH. KŌNĒRINMAIKOṆḌĀṆ—5th YEAR.

summary.p: This is also probably an inscription of Sundara-Pāṇḍya mentioned in No. 13 above. It registers the execution of an order issued to them by the king, by the sabhā, the nāṭṭār and the nagarattār of Ēḻūr-nāḍu, granting 1020 kuḻi of wet land free of taxes to a certain Sarvadēvabhaṭṭa-Sarvakratu of Pāśāṟṟūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Eḻurnāṭṭu ssabhai yārkkum nāṭṭārkkum nakarattārkkum pācāṟṟu sarvvadevabhaṭṭa ssarvvakratukkaḷuk kut tāṅkaḷ palavūr
kaḷilum bhūdāṉa [ karadāṉa] māka Irupattu nālaṭikkolālt tāṅkaḷ Ivarkkuk kuṭutta kuḻi Āyirattirupatum tāṅka ḷivarkkuk kuṭuttapaṭiye nāmuṅ kuṭuttu Innilattile veṇṭum payiṟ
ceytukoṇṭu cantrādityavaraiyum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉubhavik kumpaṭi coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivōlaiye piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Innilam candrāditya varaiyuñ cellak ka
lliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvittuk kuṭukka [*.] Ivai viḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiyak kāṅkayarāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 5 nāḷ 4 10 2 tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaiko
ṇṭāṉ Eḻurnāṭṭu ssabhaiyārkkum nāṭṭārkkum nakarattārkkum pācāṟṟūr sarvvadevabhaṭṭa ssarvvakratukkaḷukkut tāṅkaḷ Irupattu nālaṭik kolālp pala vūrkaḷilum viṭṭa kuḻi 1000 2 10- m va
riyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻikkac coṉṉom Ippaṭikku Ivolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu Intak kuḻi Āyirattirupatum mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāvatai taṅkaḷ nāṭṭuk kaṇakkiluṅ kaḻittu candrā—
dityavaṟ cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttu mutal Aṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉubhavittuppotuvār Ippaṭi paṇṇuka Ivai kappalūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vāṇātarāyaṉ (r)
Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 5 nāḷ 4 10 2 .
Digital edition of SII 22.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
